module_info.docstring:
Tests for subagent progress relay (issue #169).

Verifies that:
- KawaiiSpinner.print_above() works with and without active spinner
- _build_child_progress_callback handles CLI/gateway/no-display paths
- Thinking events are relayed correctly
- Parallel callbacks don't share state

methods.name: test_print_above_without_spinner_running
methods.docstring: print_above should write to stdout even when spinner is not running.

methods.name: test_print_above_with_spinner_running
methods.docstring: print_above should clear spinner line and print text.

methods.name: test_print_above_uses_captured_stdout
methods.docstring:
print_above should use self._out, not sys.stdout.
This ensures it works inside redirect_stdout(devnull).

classes.name: TestBuildChildProgressCallback
classes.docstring: Tests for child progress callback builder.

methods.name: test_returns_none_when_no_display
methods.docstring: Should return None when parent has no spinner or callback.

methods.name: test_cli_spinner_tool_event
methods.docstring: Should print tool line above spinner for CLI path.

methods.name: test_cli_spinner_thinking_event
methods.docstring: Should print thinking line above spinner for CLI path.

methods.name: test_gateway_batched_progress
methods.docstring: Gateway path should batch tool calls and flush at BATCH_SIZE.

methods.name: test_thinking_not_relayed_to_gateway
methods.docstring: Thinking events should NOT be sent to gateway (too noisy).

methods.name: test_parallel_callbacks_independent
methods.docstring: Each child's callback should have independent batch state.

methods.name: test_task_index_prefix_in_batch_mode
methods.docstring: Batch mode (task_count > 1) should show 1-indexed prefix for all tasks.

methods.name: test_single_task_no_prefix
methods.docstring: Single task (task_count=1) should not show index prefix.

classes.name: TestThinkingCallback
classes.docstring: Tests for the _thinking callback in AIAgent conversation loop.

methods.name: _simulate_thinking_callback
methods.docstring:
Simulate the exact code path from run_agent.py for the thinking callback.

delegate_depth: simulates self._delegate_depth.
    0 = main agent (should NOT fire), >=1 = subagent (should fire).

methods.name: test_thinking_callback_fires_on_content
methods.docstring:
tool_progress_callback should receive _thinking event
when assistant message has content.

methods.name: test_thinking_callback_skipped_when_no_content
methods.docstring: Should not fire when assistant has no content.

methods.name: test_thinking_callback_truncates_long_content
methods.docstring: Should truncate long content to 80 chars.

methods.name: test_thinking_callback_skipped_for_main_agent
methods.docstring:
Main agent (delegate_depth=0) should NOT fire thinking events.
This prevents gateway spam on Telegram/Discord.

methods.name: test_thinking_callback_strips_reasoning_scratchpad
methods.docstring: REASONING_SCRATCHPAD tags should be stripped before display.

methods.name: test_thinking_callback_strips_think_tags
methods.docstring: <think> tags should be stripped before display.

methods.name: test_thinking_callback_empty_after_strip
methods.docstring: Should not fire when content is only XML tags.

classes.name: TestBatchFlush
classes.docstring: Tests for gateway batch flush on subagent completion.

methods.name: test_flush_sends_remaining_batch
methods.docstring: _flush should send remaining tool names to gateway.

methods.name: test_flush_noop_when_batch_empty
methods.docstring: _flush should not send anything when batch is empty.

methods.name: test_flush_noop_when_no_parent_callback
methods.docstring: _flush should not crash when there's no parent callback.
